name: Richard Labonne
text: top great work, nothing less, nothing to complain about

name: Dan
text: Ishan Shrestha truly excels in AI Development with his remarkable CODE EXPERTISE and professional documentation. His proactive communication and fluency in language create a seamless collaboration experience, making him a top choice for any project! 🙌

name: Natalia Glekkel
text: Great work from Ishan. This is my second order and Ishan delivered an exceptional work timely. Communication is very efficient and fast. Highly recommend

name: Natalia Glekkel
text: Ishan went above and beyond on meeting and exceeding my expectations with this project delivery. He integrated AI, updated front end, back end, the database, the landing page and added additional features. Excellent work and looking forward on working with Ishan on more projects.

name: Bryan
text: fantastic job... couldn't be happier... perfect English too!

name: Bryan
text: im very happy. He delivered better than what was expected and even completed the project before the deadline.

name: Zeno Groenweng
text: Excellent work in creating an AI Api on our website with end user interface, admin panel and payment interface. Thank you!
